case_title: ARNAIDO TEODORO VS. PATRICIA CHIN et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF NOV-02-2009 IS OFF CALENDAR DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF TEODORO, ARNAIDO SERVED MAY-07-2009, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CHIN, PATRICIA

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-02-2009 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE SEP-18-2009 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TEODORO, ARNAIDO AS TO DEFENDANT CHIN, PATRICIA DOES 1 TO 25 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR SEP-18-2009 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-15-2009 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         SEP-03-2009
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
